Mint Android SDK
search in API
Mint Android SDK/investwell.charts.mikephil.charting.charts/BubbleChart

BubbleChart

open class BubbleChart : BarLineChartBase<T> , BubbleDataProvider

The BubbleChart. Draws bubbles. Bubble chart implementation: Copyright 2015 Pierre-Marc Airoldi Licensed under Apache License 2.0. In the BubbleChart, it is the area of the bubble, not the radius or diameter of the bubble that conveys the data.

Author

Philipp Jahoda

Returns a recyclable MPPointD instance Returns the x and y values in the chart at the given touch point (encapsulated in a MPPointD).

saveToGallery
Link copied to clipboard
open fun saveToGallery(fileName: String): Boolean
Saves the current state of the chart to the gallery as a PNG image.
open fun saveToGallery(fileName: String, quality: Int): Boolean
Saves the current state of the chart to the gallery as a JPEG image.
open fun saveToGallery(fileName: String, subFolderPath: String, fileDescription: String, format: Bitmap.CompressFormat, quality: Int): Boolean
Saves the current state of the chart to the gallery as an image type.
saveToPath
Link copied to clipboard
open fun saveToPath(title: String, pathOnSD: String): Boolean
Saves the current chart state with the given name to the given path on the sdcard leaving the path empty "" will put the saved file directly on the SD card chart is saved as a PNG image, example: saveToPath("myfilename", "foldername1/foldername2");

setDescendantFocusability
Link copied to clipboard

setDescription
Link copied to clipboard
open fun setDescription(desc: Description)
Sets a new Description object for the chart.
setDoubleTapToZoomEnabled
Link copied to clipboard
open fun setDoubleTapToZoomEnabled(enabled: Boolean)
Set this to true to enable zooming in by double-tap on the chart.
setDragDecelerationEnabled
Link copied to clipboard
open fun setDragDecelerationEnabled(enabled: Boolean)
If set to true, chart continues to scroll after touch up.
setDragDecelerationFrictionCoef
Link copied to clipboard
open fun setDragDecelerationFrictionCoef(newValue: Float)
Deceleration friction coefficient in [0 ; 1] interval, higher values indicate that speed will decrease slowly, for example if it set to 0, it will stop immediately.
setDragEnabled
Link copied to clipboard
open fun setDragEnabled(enabled: Boolean)
Set this to true to enable dragging (moving the chart with the finger) for the chart (this does not effect scaling).
setDragOffsetX
Link copied to clipboard
open fun setDragOffsetX(offset: Float)
Set an offset in dp that allows the user to drag the chart over it's bounds on the x-axis.
setDragOffsetY
Link copied to clipboard
open fun setDragOffsetY(offset: Float)
Set an offset in dp that allows the user to drag the chart over it's bounds on the y-axis.
setDragXEnabled
Link copied to clipboard
open fun setDragXEnabled(enabled: Boolean)
Set this to true to enable dragging on the X axis
setDragYEnabled
Link copied to clipboard
open fun setDragYEnabled(enabled: Boolean)
Set this to true to enable dragging on the Y axis
setDrawBorders
Link copied to clipboard
open fun setDrawBorders(enabled: Boolean)
When enabled, the borders rectangle will be rendered.
setDrawGridBackground
Link copied to clipboard
open fun setDrawGridBackground(enabled: Boolean)
set this to true to draw the grid background, false if not

Link copied to clipboard

setVisibleXRange
Link copied to clipboard
open fun setVisibleXRange(minXRange: Float, maxXRange: Float)
Limits the maximum and minimum x range that can be visible by pinching and zooming.
setVisibleXRangeMaximum
Link copied to clipboard
open fun setVisibleXRangeMaximum(maxXRange: Float)
Sets the size of the area (range on the x-axis) that should be maximum visible at once (no further zooming out allowed).
setVisibleXRangeMinimum
Link copied to clipboard
open fun setVisibleXRangeMinimum(minXRange: Float)
Sets the size of the area (range on the x-axis) that should be minimum visible at once (no further zooming in allowed).
setVisibleYRange
Link copied to clipboard
open fun setVisibleYRange(minYRange: Float, maxYRange: Float, axis: YAxis.AxisDependency)
Limits the maximum and minimum y range that can be visible by pinching and zooming.
setVisibleYRangeMaximum
Link copied to clipboard
open fun setVisibleYRangeMaximum(maxYRange: Float, axis: YAxis.AxisDependency)
Sets the size of the area (range on the y-axis) that should be maximum visible at once.
setVisibleYRangeMinimum
Link copied to clipboard
open fun setVisibleYRangeMinimum(minYRange: Float, axis: YAxis.AxisDependency)
Sets the size of the area (range on the y-axis) that should be minimum visible at once, no further zooming in possible.
